hero.headline: Find trusted Kiwi tradies for your home improvement jobs.
hero.subcopy: Describe the job once. Verified local tradies send you quotes — no cold calls, no chasing callbacks, no guesswork on price.

homeownerCard.title: Post a job
homeownerCard.description: Tell us what needs doing — a leaky tap, a full renovation, or anything in between. It takes about two minutes.

tradieCard.title: Join as a tradie
tradieCard.description: Get matched with local jobs that fit your trade and your schedule. Quote only on the work you actually want.

steps.title: Post the job
steps.description: Describe what you need done and where. Add photos if it helps — most jobs take under two minutes to list.

steps.title: Review quotes
steps.description: Local tradies get in touch with quotes and availability. Compare prices, ratings and past work side by side.

steps.title: Hire with confidence
steps.description: Pick the right tradie for the job and get it booked in. Leave a review once it's done to help the next homeowner.

ctaBand.heading: Got a job that needs doing?
ctaBand.subcopy: Post it today and start hearing back from local tradies within hours.

footerTagline: Connecting homeowners with trusted, verified tradies across Aotearoa New Zealand.
